title: calophyllum grandiflorum
intro: Calophyllum grandiflorum, also known as the Kamani tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. Its wood and seeds have been valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum grandiflorum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. In traditional medicine, the seeds are often prepared as an oil or extract, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic properties.
